temporal_description:
The audio opens with the loud, chaotic sound of a person splashing violently in water, accompanied by a tense, low-frequency electronic hum that creates a sense of urgency and danger. In a dark, nighttime scene, a figure wearing a blue jacket splashes through the water, creating a large, white wake. The water is choppy, and the background is almost entirely black, with only a few faint, out-of-focus lights visible in the distance. In the top left corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed. The camera is positioned at a low angle, capturing the action from the water's surface.

The scene cuts to a close-up of a man in a dimly lit room. He is wearing a dark suit, a light-colored shirt, and a striped tie. He has a serious expression as he looks off-camera to his right. He holds a walkie-talkie to his mouth, speaking into it. In the background, a bulletin board covered with black-and-white photos is visible but out of focus. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. A man's voice, filled with alarm and seriousness, cuts through the noise, speaking quickly into what sounds like a radio. "抓到人了，货被他们扔下海了。" (We've got the person, they threw the goods into the sea.)

The camera angle shifts slightly, showing the same man from a slightly different perspective. He continues to speak into the walkie-talkie, his expression remaining intense and focused. The background and on-screen text are unchanged. Another man responds with a sharp, commanding voice, filled with shock and urgency, "什么？等等，等等！" (What? Wait, wait, wait!)

The shot changes to a wider view, showing the man in the suit from the side. He is still holding the walkie-talkie. In the foreground, another man in a light-colored, short-sleeved shirt leans forward, looking at the first man with a concerned and urgent expression. The background is a cluttered office or control room, with multiple computer monitors displaying various data and graphics. The "风行网" text is still present in the top left corner. The camera is steady, focusing on the interaction between the two men.
